title: String Clumps
description: Clumps stacks of string together to reduce lag
body:
![string clumps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5ae0ac03507d326765beed594de56cdddbc98fb.png)

**Clumps multiple stacks of string together to reduce lag.**

Can bring together multiple stacks of string entities nearby into one to improve performance (mostly on servers with string dupers). 

Should work on both client and server or seperately aswell.
